description: Counts passenger cars currently no longer registered, grouped by current status-date year. Use for annual deregistration/removal volume. Caveat: current non-registered status date, not a full lifecycle event log.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword != "Registreret" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL | EVAL deregistration_year = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato) | WHERE deregistration_year >= 1990 AND deregistration_year <= 2030 | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY deregistration_year, status = KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword | SORT deregistration_year DESC, car_count DESC | LIMIT 80
